L1.area: HTTP callback and notification handling subsystem

L2.description: A null pointer dereference vulnerability exists in the data change notification processing logic. When a crafted HTTP request is sent to a subscription-related endpoint with a malformed URL path and a large JSON payload, the service attempts to look up user equipment context but fails to validate whether the lookup succeeded before dereferencing the result. This causes a nil pointer dereference panic, leading to a complete service crash and denial of service.

L3.area: HTTP callback and notification handling subsystem
L3.description: A null pointer dereference vulnerability exists in the data change notification processing logic. When a crafted HTTP request is sent to a subscription-related endpoint with a malformed URL path and a large JSON payload, the service attempts to look up user equipment context but fails to validate whether the lookup succeeded before dereferencing the result. This causes a nil pointer dereference panic, leading to a complete service crash and denial of service.

ground_truth.reason: The DataChangeNotificationProcedure function discards the boolean return value from UdmUeFindBySupi and proceeds to dereference the potentially nil UE context pointer, causing a panic when the lookup fails for a non-existent subscriber.
